title: Google Shared Drive File Selection
excerpt: Requesting proper integration with Google Shared Drives. Current file selection interface only allows for navigating (in a somewhat broken fashion) files on Google MyDrive. The workaround of navigating to the file on a G…

posts.author: Benr (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml: Requesting proper integration with Google Shared Drives. Current file selection interface only allows for navigating (in a somewhat broken fashion) files on Google MyDrive. The workaround of navigating to the file on a Google Shared Drive, copying the link and pasting it into Monday as a link is too many button presses and adherence is poor. The result is duplication of files on Monday.com which already exist on a Google Shared Drive.

posts.author: Rio (Rio)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes PLEASE! This was actually something we expected to work when seeing “Google Workspace” integration.

posts.author: clbuzz (Charlotte)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking to switch from a different project management system and I was excited to see Drive integration but it can only access My Drive. We all work from a company Shared Drive so that’s disappointing. I guess I’ll have to a link as a workaround but this aspect makes it not an improvement over what we’re using now.
